titles.text: トリフェルズ魔法学園

descriptions.text: Eberouge (エーベルージュ, Ēberūju) is a 1997 video game developed by Japan Media Programming and published by Takara on the Sega Saturn and PlayStation in Japan. It is a dating sim game with similar gameplay and graphical representation to Konami's Tokimeki Memorial. It is based on a dating sim originally made by Fujitsu on home computers.
